title: Commvault Client
description: Represents a client (server, workstation, virtual machine, or laptop) registered with the Commvault CommServe for data protection. Clients host agents that perform backup and restore operations.

hostName.description: Network hostname or FQDN of the client

osType.description: Operating system type of the client

commCellId.description: CommCell ID the client belongs to

activityControl.description: Controls which operations are enabled on this client

enableDataAging.description: Whether data aging operations are enabled

agents.description: List of installed agents (iDataAgents) on this client

installDirectory.description: Path to the Commvault software installation directory

lastBackupTime.description: Timestamp of the last successful backup on this client

planName.description: Name of the server plan associated with this client

Agent.description: An iDataAgent installed on a client that handles backup and restore for a specific application type

applicationName.description: Name of the agent (e.g., File System, SQL Server, Exchange)

installed.description: Whether the agent is currently installed
